'''Baralou''' was a [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Star/Legends|star]] in the [[Baralou system/Legends|Baralou system]],<ref name="PGV1" /> located in the [[Varada sector/Legends|Varada sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by four [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and the [[Alou Belt]]. The innermost planet, [[Baralou]], was the tropical oceanic [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Krikthasi]] and [[Multopos]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="PGV1" />
